title: COLLATE sequence for ORDER/GROUP BY ignored when using an index-on-expression
poc: CREATE INDEX i2 ON t2( substr(x, 2) );
SELECT substr(x, 2) FROM t2 ORDER BY substr(x, 2) COLLATE nocase;
key_bug_features: COLLATE sequence ignored with index-on-expression in ORDER BY
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT COLLATE nocase, value INTEGER);
SELECT name FROM t3 ORDER BY name COLLATE RTRIM;
